description: Product Description Affordable Everyday Living Here at URBN-Toys we strive to bring customers High Quality Everyday Products at affordable prices. We source the best materials for our products and have them manufacturer with the everyday consumer in mind. High Quality Affordable Simple 100 Pcs Assorted Party Bag Fillers Toys Lucky Dip Children Kids Gift Party Prize Make every celebration extra special with our 100-piece Mixed Party Bag Filler Toys, designed to bring joy and excitement to children of all ages. This vibrant assortment offers a diverse mix of playful trinkets, ensuring that every party favor is filled with fun surprises. Arriving in a beautifully illustrated box, this set is perfect for birthdays, school events, and festive gatherings. 100-piece Mixed Party Bag Filler Toys. Comes in a vibrant, illustrated box, perfect for gifting. Assortment of toys may vary. Ideal for birthdays, school events, and other celebrations. Offers a cost-effective and convenient solution for gatherings. A Variety of Fun for Every Occasion With a wide range of classic novelties and quirky gadgets, this collection eliminates the hassle of selecting individual favors. The variety ensures hours of entertainment, making it a cost-effective and convenient choice for large parties. Whether you’re handing them out individually or using them as game prizes, these charming toys will create cherished memories for every child. From miniature puzzles to spinning tops and playful figurines, each toy is carefully chosen to engage young minds. The generous number of pieces ensures that every child receives a unique selection, sparking excitement and keeping the fun going long after the party ends. Unforgettable Party Moments Adding an element of surprise, no two boxes are exactly the same, making every set a delightful mystery. The ever-changing mix keeps the experience fresh and thrilling, as children eagerly discover what’s inside. Packaged in a colorful box, this set also doubles as a decorative addition to your party. Once the festivities are over, the sturdy box can be reused for storage, keeping any leftover toys neatly organized. A must-have for any celebration, this 100-piece toy assortment brings smiles, laughter, and an unforgettable party experience.
